playwrightResults.note: Playwright automation not available in this environment; manual MongoDB scan performed instead

issues.title: French (fr) language entirely missing from production
issues.description: 0 MongoDB documents for fr language. 821 pages missing. fr directory created in i18n-backup with zh content as placeholder.
issues.fix: Run AI translation pipeline on all 821 zh pages → generate fr MongoDB documents. Use ai-server/translate_mongo_en.js pattern adapted for fr.

issues.title: en ogTitle contains untranslated Chinese (64 pages)
issues.description: 64 English pages have Chinese product names in ogTitle field. Translation mappings generated in /app/scripts/fix-mongo-ogtitle-alt.js.
issues.fix: Run fix-mongo-ogtitle-alt.js against MongoDB. All 64 translations pre-computed.

issues.title: es ogTitle contains untranslated Chinese (71 pages)
issues.description: 71 Spanish pages have Chinese ogTitle values.
issues.fix: Extend fix-mongo-ogtitle-alt.js to include es translations (use DeepSeek API for batch translation).

issues.title: ru ogTitle contains untranslated Chinese (28 pages)
issues.description: 28 Russian pages have Chinese ogTitle values.
issues.fix: Extend fix-mongo-ogtitle-alt.js to include ru translations.

issues.title: en hero.alt contains untranslated Chinese (31 pages)
issues.description: 31 English pages have Chinese alt text for hero images.

issues.title: ru hero.alt contains untranslated Chinese (29 pages)
es hero.alt contains untranslated Chinese (many pages)
es hero.title has mixed CN/ES content (3 pages)
issues.description: 3 Spanish pages have Chinese characters in hero.title (e.g., 'C/Z型檩条搭接螺栓', '筛箱环槽铆钉/Huck螺栓', 'EPDM防水胶条')
issues.fix: Manual fix: replace with Spanish translations.

issues.title: ar has 3 minor Chinese residues (1 ogTitle + 2 alt)
i18n-backup has 126 extra en files not in zh
issues.description: 126 en files exist in i18n-backup that have no zh counterparts. These may be orphaned or need zh templates created.
issues.fix: Audit each file: if content exists in MongoDB and is valid, create zh templates. Otherwise, remove orphaned files.

issues.title: i18n-backup files are outdated (contain untranslated Chinese)
issues.description: All i18n-backup non-zh files contain Chinese content because they were never updated after MongoDB translation. The i18n-backup shows: en=163 files with CN, ru=726, ar=476, es=415. MongoDB is clean.
issues.fix: Sync i18n-backup FROM MongoDB (not the other way). Run: node sync-i18n-redis.js equivalent for file export.

newPatterns.title: ogTitle field-level translation gap
newPatterns.description: ogTitle field is frequently missed during bulk translation because it's a short SEO field that gets overlooked. Pattern: product name (Chinese) + ' — LightingMetal' instead of translated name.
newPatterns.fix: Add ogTitle to translation checklist. Post-translation audit should scan ogTitle specifically.
newPatterns.autoCheck: Aggregate count of CN chars in modules.seo.ogTitle per language

newPatterns.title: hero.alt field-level translation gap
newPatterns.description: hero.alt (image alt text) is missed during translation. Same pattern as ogTitle.

newPatterns.title: Full language missing (fr) due to no translation pipeline execution
newPatterns.description: Entire fr language has 0 documents. Translation pipeline was never run for this language.
newPatterns.fix: Build fr translation pipeline using existing DeepSeek API + MongoDB pattern from ai-server/translate_mongo_en.js

fixesApplied.fr_directory_created: Copied 821 zh files to /app/i18n-backup/fr/ as translation source
fixesApplied.ru_missing_files_restored: Copied 18 site-level files from zh to ru (about, contact, faq, index, navbar, footer, etc.)
fixesApplied.en_ogtitle_translations: 64 translations generated for en ogTitle Chinese residue
fixesApplied.en_alt_translations: 20 translations generated for en hero.alt Chinese residue
fixesApplied.mongo_fix_script: /app/scripts/fix-mongo-ogtitle-alt.js (ready to run, en translations complete, es/ru/ar need AI completion)
